requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, and Power Quality for Networked Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩的OCPP、EMC及电能质量
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁的OCPP、EMC及電能品質

summary.en: Zimbabwe official sources do not show a mature national OCPP mandate for EV charge points as of 2026-06-14. However, networked public or fleet chargers should be specified with OCPP back-office interoperability, cybersecurity controls, metering records, remote fault handling, and load-management functions where required by the charge-point operator, site owner, fleet operator, or utility connection study. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-series requirements and any ZETDC site limits because high-power rectifiers can affect weak feeders, especially during constrained grid conditions.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，官方来源未显示津巴布韦已有成熟的全国性EV充电点OCPP强制要求。然而，公共或车队联网充电桩应按充电点运营商、场地方、车队运营商或公用事业接入研究要求，配置OCPP后台互操作、网络安全控制、计量记录、远程故障处理和负载管理功能。由于大功率整流器可能影响薄弱馈线，尤其是在电网受限条件下，应按IEC 61000系列要求和任何ZETDC现场限值准备EMC及电能质量证据。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，官方來源未顯示辛巴威已有成熟的全國性EV充電點OCPP強制要求。然而，公共或車隊聯網充電樁應按充電點運營商、場地方、車隊運營商或公用事業接入研究要求，配置OCPP後台互操作、網絡安全控制、計量記錄、遠程故障處理和負載管理功能。由於大功率整流器可能影響薄弱饋線，尤其是在電網受限條件下，應按IEC 61000系列要求和任何ZETDC現場限值準備EMC及電能品質證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems, where specified
OCPP — back-office communication for networked chargers, where specified by operator or tender
ZETDC project-specific harmonic, metering, and load-management conditions

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the battery management system. This is a vehicle-to-charger CAN protocol, not an OCPP back-office protocol. China AC and DC charger EMC evidence may be based on domestic GB/T standards and operator specifications, but those reports need mapping to IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 and the Zimbabwe site conditions.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的通信。该协议是车桩CAN通信协议，不是OCPP后台协议。中国交流和直流充电桩EMC证据可能基于国内GB/T标准及运营商规范，但这些报告需要映射至IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2和津巴布韦现场条件。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的通訊。該協議是車樁CAN通訊協議，不是OCPP後台協議。中國交流和直流充電樁EMC證據可能基於國內GB/T標準及運營商規範，但這些報告需要映射至IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2和辛巴威現場條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports the OCPP version required by the Zimbabwe buyer or network operator; (2) the charger can support remote monitoring, billing data, fault alerts, and load control under intermittent connectivity; (3) IEC EMC and harmonic evidence is available for the exact model and power level; (4) DC chargers using CCS2 replace GB/T 27930 vehicle communication with IEC-compatible communication; (5) site testing covers weak-grid or backup-power operation where solar-plus-battery systems are used.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持津巴布韦买方或网络运营商要求的OCPP版本；(2) 充电桩可在间歇性通信条件下支持远程监控、计费数据、故障报警和负载控制；(3) 针对确切型号和功率等级提供IEC EMC及谐波证据；(4) 采用CCS2的直流充电桩将GB/T 27930车辆通信替换为IEC兼容通信；(5) 如使用太阳能加电池系统，现场测试覆盖弱电网或备用电源运行。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁韌體支持辛巴威買方或網絡運營商要求的OCPP版本；(2) 充電樁可在間歇性通訊條件下支持遠程監控、計費數據、故障報警和負載控制；(3) 針對確切型號和功率等級提供IEC EMC及諧波證據；(4) 採用CCS2的直流充電樁將GB/T 27930車輛通訊替換為IEC兼容通訊；(5) 如使用太陽能加電池系統，現場測試覆蓋弱電網或備用電源運行。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP is mandatory when required by operator, fleet, tender, or network specification; EMC and power-quality evidence are expected where SAZ-adopted IEC standards, ZERA / ZETDC connection conditions, or site engineering studies require them
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication but is not an OCPP back-office protocol and is not a CCS2 communication substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat GB/T 27930 or China operator software as Zimbabwe network readiness. For networked Zimbabwe chargers, confirm OCPP requirements, IEC EMC evidence, harmonic limits, and weak-grid or backup-power behaviour before site activation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将GB/T 27930或中国运营商软件视为津巴布韦联网就绪。对于津巴布韦联网充电桩，应在站点启用前确认OCPP要求、IEC EMC证据、谐波限值以及弱电网或备用电源运行表现。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將GB/T 27930或中國運營商軟件視為辛巴威聯網就緒。對於辛巴威聯網充電樁，應在站點啟用前確認OCPP要求、IEC EMC證據、諧波限值以及弱電網或備用電源運行表現。
